quoteHero: Life is not fair, so get used to it.
description1About: Hi, I'm Agus Efendi, a web developer focused on building scalable and reliable applications. I specialize in backend development, with a strong interest in system design, data flow, and performance optimization, and I enjoy turning complex requirements into structured and efficient solutions. In addition, I’m capable of working across the full stack, delivering complete web applications with clean, functional, and user-friendly interfaces. I continuously improve my skills through hands-on projects, with an emphasis on writing maintainable code and building practical solutions, and I’m open to opportunities, collaborations, and projects where I can contribute and grow.
description2About: I believe that growth is not only shaped by individual effort, but also by the people we connect with. Building meaningful connections opens up opportunities, encourages knowledge sharing, and helps us grow together. Feel free to connect or follow me through the social media below, as I’m open to discussions, collaborations, or simply exchanging ideas and experiences. Find me here 👇
descriptionPortfolio: A selection of projects I’ve worked on, showcasing my experience in building functional and practical applications.
